description: Spill 1 performance budget — refresh with `npm run perf:baseline` after an intentional change. Reviewers must check the `current` diff carefully; see scripts/performance-budget/README.md for the review protocol.
_note: Baseline captured on 2026-04-24 after PR #468 removed 12 backdrop-filter elements (`backdropFilterCount` 2→0). `rafCallsPerSec` values reflect preview.html hosting 5 concurrent Pixi.Application instances (wheel/chest/oddsen/colordraft/mystery), each running its own ticker — so at 60Hz CI the aggregate RAF count floats around 300/s, scaling up on 120Hz+ dev displays. `max` values carry ~2x headroom to tolerate both CI variance and high-refresh dev measurements; tighten via `npm run perf:baseline` once we have a stable post-merge reference.
